title: ASK Document Envelope
description: Common header wrapping every extracted ASK record. Identifying metadata and source provenance live at the top level; the type-specific payload lives under `data`, validated by the live schema for its `type` (see schemas/combined/base_and_<type>.json).

type.description: The data type of the payload; matches the live schema name (e.g. invoice).

created.description: When this record was created, ISO 8601 date-time without timezone (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss, e.g. 2026-06-22T00:08:00). The `date-time` format documents intent; the pattern is what the validator enforces, since jsonschema's default FormatChecker does not check date-time.

source.description: Provenance of the source document this record was extracted from.

fileName.description: Original source file name in inbox/.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the source file.

data.description: The type-specific payload. Replaced by the live schema for `type` in the combined schema.
